basic_details.job_title: EPIL Graduate Apprentice Recruitment 2026 – 2 Vacancies, Apply by 5 August
basic_details.organization_name: Engineering Projects (India) Ltd. (EPIL), Southern Regional Office, Chennai
basic_details.job_location: Southern Regional Office, Chennai / PCO Hyderabad (or controlled sites)
basic_details.short_information: Engineering Projects (India) Ltd. (EPIL), a Mini Ratna Central Public Sector Enterprise under the Department of Heavy Industries, Ministry of Heavy Industries & Public Enterprises, has invited applications for 2 Graduate Apprentice posts under the Apprentices Act 1961. The vacancies are for the Civil, Electrical, and Mechanical disciplines, to be engaged at EPIL's Southern Regional Office (SRO), Chennai, and Project Coordination Office (PCO), Hyderabad, or at any of their controlled sites. Interested BE/B.Tech graduates can apply by email on or before 5 August 2026, 17:30 hours.

age_limit.details: Minimum age: 18 years; Maximum age: 30 years, as on the last date of submission of the application.

qualification.details: BE/B.Tech in Civil, Electrical, or Mechanical Engineering with not less than 55% marks from a reputed Institute/University approved by AICTE. | If a university/institute does not provide CGPA-to-percentage conversion, a minimum of 6 on a 10-point scale will be considered equivalent to 60%; other scales will be prorated accordingly. If the university/institute provides an official conversion, the equivalent percentage indicated on the marksheet should be used. The percentage from the consolidated marksheet (covering all semesters/years) will be considered. If no consolidated marksheet is issued, the final percentage will be calculated as the average across all semesters/years.

vacancy_details.Location: Southern Regional Office, Chennai (or any of its controlled sites)
PCO Hyderabad (or any of its controlled sites)

discipline_wise_breakdown.location: Southern Regional Office, Chennai (or any of its controlled sites)
PCO Hyderabad (or any of its controlled sites)

salary_details.details: Selected Graduate Apprentices will be paid a consolidated stipend of Rs. 10,000/- (Ten Thousand only) per month throughout the training duration. No output bonus, incentives, perks, or allowances will be paid in addition to this stipend.

selection_process: There will be no interview. Eligible candidates will be shortlisted purely on a merit list prepared on the basis of marks secured in the minimum required educational qualification.
how_to_apply: Download and fill the application in the Annexure-I format (Application for Engagement as Graduate Apprentice).
Attach supporting documents: education qualification certificates and proof of date of birth.
Send the completed application and documents by email to [email protected].
Ensure submission reaches on or before 17:30 hours on 5 August 2026. No other mode of application will be accepted.
Use a valid email ID that will remain active until the selection process is complete.
important_instructions: Every selected Graduate Apprentice must sign a contract of apprenticeship before training begins; all terms and conditions are governed by this contract. Working hours will be as applicable to the establishment; no apprentice will be required or allowed to work overtime. No extension of training or employment will be given by EPIL after completion of the one-year training. Candidates must make their own arrangements for accommodation/stay. If any information provided by an applicant is found false or concealed, the candidature will be cancelled and the candidate may be liable for prosecution. Shortlisted candidates will be informed by email, and the list will also be uploaded on the EPIL website.

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Candidates should not have completed three years after passing the qualifying examination as on 30 June 2025 — i.e., only those who passed their minimum required qualification in 2023, 2024, or 2025 are eligible to apply. Candidates awaiting the result of their minimum required qualification are not eligible to apply. Candidates who have already undergone apprenticeship training in any organization are not eligible to apply. Reservation of seats will follow Government directives and roster points as per the Apprenticeship Act 1961 and its amendments.

content_sections.heading: Educational Qualification
content_sections.text: BE/B.Tech in Civil, Electrical, or Mechanical Engineering with not less than 55% marks from a reputed Institute/University approved by AICTE. If a university/institute does not provide CGPA-to-percentage conversion, a minimum of 6 on a 10-point scale will be considered equivalent to 60%; other scales will be prorated accordingly. If the university/institute provides an official conversion, the equivalent percentage indicated on the marksheet should be used. The percentage from the consolidated marksheet (covering all semesters/years) will be considered. If no consolidated marksheet is issued, the final percentage will be calculated as the average across all semesters/years.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Minimum age: 18 years ; Maximum age: 30 years , as on the last date of submission of the application.

content_sections.heading: Stipend
content_sections.text: Selected Graduate Apprentices will be paid a consolidated stipend of Rs. 10,000/- (Ten Thousand only) per month throughout the training duration. No output bonus, incentives, perks, or allowances will be paid in addition to this stipend.

content_sections.heading: Selection Process
content_sections.text: There will be no interview . Eligible candidates will be shortlisted purely on a merit list prepared on the basis of marks secured in the minimum required educational qualification.

content_sections.heading: Required Documents
content_sections.text: Duly filled application in the Annexure-I format Educational qualification certificates Proof of date of birth Shortlisted candidates will later need to produce all original testimonials/certificates at the time of verification, and a medical fitness certificate before joining.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for EPIL Graduate Apprentice Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Download and fill the application in the Annexure-I format (Application for Engagement as Graduate Apprentice). Attach supporting documents: education qualification certificates and proof of date of birth. Send the completed application and documents by email to [email protected] . Ensure submission reaches on or before 17:30 hours on 5 August 2026 . No other mode of application will be accepted. Use a valid email ID that will remain active until the selection process is complete.

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions
content_sections.text: Every selected Graduate Apprentice must sign a contract of apprenticeship before training begins; all terms and conditions are governed by this contract. Working hours will be as applicable to the establishment; no apprentice will be required or allowed to work overtime. No extension of training or employment will be given by EPIL after completion of the one-year training. Candidates must make their own arrangements for accommodation/stay. If any information provided by an applicant is found false or concealed, the candidature will be cancelled and the candidate may be liable for prosecution. Shortlisted candidates will be informed by email, and the list will also be uploaded on the EPIL website.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for EPIL Graduate Apprentice Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted by email on or before 5 August 2026, till 17:30 hours.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are there in EPIL Graduate Apprentice Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are 2 vacancies - 1 at the Southern Regional Office, Chennai, and 1 at PCO Hyderabad.

faq.question: Q3. What is the eligibility for EPIL Graduate Apprentice posts?
faq.answer: A BE/B.Tech in Civil, Electrical, or Mechanical Engineering with at least 55% marks from an AICTE-approved institute, and passed in 2023, 2024, or 2025 only.

faq.question: Q4. What is the stipend for EPIL Graduate Apprentice?
faq.answer: Rs. 10,000/- per month, consolidated, with no additional bonus, incentives, or allowances.

faq.question: Q5. Is there an interview for EPIL Graduate Apprentice selection?
faq.answer: No. Selection is purely merit-based, using marks from the minimum required qualification.

faq.question: Q6. How can I apply for EPIL Graduate Apprentice Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: By sending the Annexure-I application form with supporting documents to [email protected]. No other mode of application is accepted

faq.question: Q7. Can candidates awaiting their final year results apply?
faq.answer: No, candidates awaiting the result of their minimum required qualification are not eligible.
